content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Scope external IDs to feed and format semantics, detect collisions, and preserve the raw identity basis and parser version.

hints: For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Scoped Entry Key model · Theory Feed Ts Scoped E…, name the reader, publisher, source and emitted revision, Node, TypeScript, tenant, URL, unknown XML, runtime validation, Fetch, Promise, AbortSignal, PostgreSQL, Express, handle, accessibility, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Feed Ts Scoped Entry Key precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Scoped Entry Key model · Theory Feed Ts Scoped E…, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A theory TypeScript team handles case 4295 during a hostile XML and unknown-value admission drill. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove scoped identity, typed upsert outcomes, revisions, tombstones, and replay convergence; browser TypeScript must remain deterministic and free of Node, network, database, and host effects; then inject one URL, DNS, redirect, stream, compression, timeout, abort, or publisher-budget failure and settle ownership. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Scope external IDs to feed and format semantics, detect collisions, and preserve the raw identity basis and parser version.

For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Scoped Entry Key model · Theory Feed Ts Scoped E…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: RSS GUID values are globally unique URLs.

checks.failureMessage: Add the exact evidence marker // Evidence: feed-ts-scoped-entry-key-17mz0l.

checks.pattern: // Evidence: feed-ts-scoped-entry-key-17mz0l(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?function\s+evidence_feed_ts_scoped_entry_key_17mz0l\s*\([^)]*\)\s*:\s*Readonly<\{[^}]+\}>\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?ingestionAttempts < 10)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?convergedAttempts < 10 \|\| convergedAttempts > ingestionAttempts)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?revisionCases < 3)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?duplicateEffects > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
